hero.sub: Boutique consulting for investors entering the Cyprus, Georgia and Dubai property markets. Strategy first — the asset second.

sections.aboutP1: SafeEra is a boutique consulting practice for investors entering property markets in Cyprus, Georgia and Dubai. We start with your objective: capital preservation, first international entry, passive income, or portfolio diversification.
sections.aboutP2: The asset is just an instrument. We own the strategy, the legal logic, the source-of-wealth narrative, and the relationship with the developer after the deal closes. One client — one objective — full guidance.
sections.marketsLead: Each market solves a different investor problem. We only work where we have direct relationships with developers.
sections.servicesTitle: End-to-end — from brief to keys to active management.
sections.ctaSub: Leave your contact — we'll respond within one business day for a complimentary 30-minute consultation.
sections.midsiteTitle: One client. One objective. Full guidance.
sections.midsiteSub: Every step — from the first call to the handover of keys — is carried by the same team. No handoffs, no disappearances.
sections.partnersBody: We work with developers and management companies in every market. Our partners are people we've closed real deals with.
sections.clientFormBody: Leave your contact and a short brief. We'll respond within one business day.
sections.partnerFormBody: If you're a developer or management company — get in touch. We only work with vetted projects.

s01.title: Investment strategy
s01.desc: We define the goal, horizon, risk profile and market before discussing any specific asset.

s02.title: Asset selection
s02.desc: A shortlist of 3–5 options from vetted developers. No mass database, no cold inventory.

s03.title: Legal guidance
s03.desc: Title due diligence, contract, escrow, registration. A bilingual lawyer on the client's side.

s04.title: Tax navigation
s04.desc: Residency-aware structuring, optimisation of CGT and rental income.

s05.title: Capital legalisation
s05.desc: Source-of-wealth packaging to AML standards. Bank-ready, no follow-up questions.

s06.title: Residency / Visa
s06.desc: Cyprus PR, Georgia residency, Dubai Golden Visa — pathway and paperwork mapped to your case.

featureService.title: Asset management
featureService.desc: After the keys, the asset keeps working: management company, transparent income report, renovations, portfolio rebalancing.

w01.title: Your brief first
w01.desc: We don't start with the developer's pitch. We start with what you actually need to solve.

w02.title: Boutique scale
w02.desc: A small concurrent caseload. Each client is owned by a partner — not a call centre.

w03.title: Relationship, not deal
w03.desc: We stay around after close — for the second purchase, for the exit, for the referral.

w04.title: Honesty
w04.desc: If the asset doesn't fit, we say so plainly — even when it's our partner's project.

w05.title: Ukrainian specifics
w05.desc: Capital structuring, currency control, Ukrainian paperwork — handled without surprises.

w06.title: Vetted partners
w06.desc: Every developer has passed our diligence. The list is short — that's the feature, not a bug.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.sub: EU jurisdiction. PR from €300k. Stable market with English-language legal system.

georgia.name: Georgia
georgia.sub: The easiest entry into international property — from $50k. High rental yields.

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.sub: 0% personal income tax. Golden Visa from $545k. Global hub with deep liquidity.

formClient.msgPh: A short brief: goal, budget, horizon...
formClient.policy: By submitting you agree to the processing of personal data.
formClient.successBody: We'll be in touch within one business day.

formPartner.msgPh: Short note: company, current projects, type of collaboration
formPartner.successBody: Thank you. We'll reply within 2 business days.
